name: IdsEdwMdlDocDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH SourceData AS (SELECT MDL_DOC_SK, MDL_DOC_ID, MDL_DOC_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MDL_DOC_TERM_DT, MDL_DOC_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MDL_DOC WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) , xfm AS (SELECT MDL_DOC_SK AS MDL_DOC_SK, MDL_DOC_ID AS MDL_DOC_ID, MDL_DOC_EFF_DT AS MDL_DOC_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, MDL_DOC_TERM_DT AS MDL_DOC_TERM_DT, MDL_DOC_NM AS MDL_DOC_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM SourceData) SELECT * FROM xfm
